prompt.content:
As part of the annual compensation cycle, Finance has approved a merit increase budget equal to 2.8% of total annual payroll for active employees. Merit increases on existing salaries should be determined based on compa ratio and performance rating, as per attached Merit Increase Matrix (Merit Increase.pdf). Use Employee Roster_Enhanced.xlsx.

If the total calculated merit increases exceed the approved budget, apply a uniform scaling factor across all employees to ensure total payouts equal the budget. Do not round intermediate calculations. Round final values to 1 decimal place.

Share in console: Total revised salary payout post merit increase for each job level. Review the files in the filesystem.

rubrics.name: States that revised salary payout post merit increase for IC1 is $5,627,276.5... (ver_72f6eb8d5e9a4a6f87dc2c30b5164812)

messages.content: States that revised salary payout post merit increase for IC1 is $5,627,276.5 (acceptable range $5,571,003.7 to $5,683,549.3).
